reviews.review_description: This game is really boring and the gun barely works

Imagine reload mechanics that are garbage. Then compound that with floating circles of a few "memes". Basically this is a gimmick and it sucks. If you like bad gimmicks and poor reload and shoot mechanics (ones that make you really question if you wanna have a vr), then this would be up your alley. As for me, I expect way better quality, mechanics, and gameplay. This does not offer that at all. Oh, and a singular circle you roam in the center of with 3 "mini game shooters" this is just. No, no all around.

This is way better than what i had in mind for a free VR shooter game, the developer did good at their job. The gun model is beautiful, the animations is slick and smooth, also the audio is fitting according  to the game main theme is memes. 
Overall great job team, hope to hear more of your future games.
